name: Frozen Peaks Foothills
description: The forest thins and dies away against a wall of grey stone. A rough trail climbs north into the mountains, where snow-laden slopes rise toward jagged white peaks that vanish into low cloud. The air here is sharp and cold, and every breath fogs before your face.
ambient_messages: A frozen wind sweeps down from the heights, cutting through cloth and flesh alike.
Somewhere far above, a sheet of ice cracks loose and tumbles down the slopes.
Fine snow hisses across the trail and gathers in the hollows of your footprints.
